title: 8 Signs Your Godly Brotherhood Is Real
caption:
Most men have a group chat. Very few have brothers.

The difference: real brothers have heard your confession, not just your highlights. One of them calls, not just reacts. Someone in the group has told you something you didn't want to hear, and you're still in it together.

Not event-driven. Not polished. You know each other's actual struggles and you'd get in the car for one of them.

That's the brotherhood God wired you for. Not a podcast, not a Discord server. Two or three men who have your number and use it.

How many of these 8 signs does yours clear? Send this to the brothers who do.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #brotherhood #accountability #mensministry #christianity
